summary: Client Fee Status feature testing completed successfully. All backend API tests (9/9) and frontend UI tests passed. The new client_fee_status and client_fee_paid_date fields work correctly in all endpoints. Dashboard shows 7 commission/client fee cards. Reports page has 4 tabs with correct filtering by respective paid dates.
seed_data_creation: Test cases created during backend testing were cleaned up. Existing data: Test Client with 2 cases - one with client_fee=500 (client_fee_status=paid, client_fee_paid_date=2026-03-05), another with client_fee=1000 (client_fee_status=paid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Fee Status feature fully implemented. Key features: 1) CaseCreate/CaseResponse models include client_fee_status and client_fee_paid_date fields, 2) dashboard/forecast returns separate client_fees_paid_this_month, client_fees_paid_last_30_days, total_client_fees_paid, client_fee_pending fields, 3) reports/commission-paid endpoint supports report_type param (commission, client_fees, both) filtering by respective paid dates, 4) CaseDetail page has Client Fee Status card with 4 buttons and date input, 5) Commission dashboard has 7 stat cards including client fee cards, 6) Reports page has 4 tabs for different report types.

backend_tests.test_2_post_case_client_fee_status: PASS - POST /api/cases accepts and stores client_fee_status and client_fee_paid_date fields
backend_tests.test_3_put_case_client_fee_status: PASS - PUT /api/cases/{id} updates client_fee_status and client_fee_paid_date correctly with GET verification
backend_tests.test_4_dashboard_forecast_fields: PASS - GET /api/dashboard/forecast returns commission_this_month, commission_last_30_days, client_fees_paid_this_month, client_fees_paid_last_30_days, total_client_fees_paid, client_fee_pending
backend_tests.test_5_client_fee_pending: PASS - client_fee_pending shows only fees with client_fee_status=pending and client_fee>0
backend_tests.test_7_reports_both_type: PASS - GET /api/reports/commission-paid?report_type=both merges commission and client fee cases correctly
backend_tests.test_8_reports_commission_type: PASS - Commission report_type filters by commission_paid_date

frontend_tests.test_8_case_detail_client_fee_status_car: PASS - CaseDetail Commission tab has Client Fee Status card with 4 buttons (Pending, Submitted to Lender, Paid, Clawed Back) with data-testid attributes
frontend_tests.test_9_case_detail_client_fee_paid_date: PASS - Client Fee Paid Date input exists (data-testid='client-fee-paid-date')
frontend_tests.test_10_commission_dashboard_cards: PASS - Commission dashboard has 7 cards: commission-this-month, commission-last-30, total-client-fees, client-fee-pending, total-commission-and-fees, client-fees-this-month, client-fees-last-30
frontend_tests.test_11_reports_page_tabs: PASS - Reports page has 4 tabs: Cases Completed, Commission, Client Fees, Commission + Fees with correct data-testid attributes
